tools.description: Cross-platform asynchronous Python Bluetooth Low Energy client for scanning and GATT operations on Windows, Linux, and macOS.
Python interface to Bluetooth LE on Linux with built-in Scanner class for BLE reconnaissance over BlueZ.
Maintained Python 3 fork of bluepy providing a BLE scanner interface to Bluetooth LE on Linux.
Python wrapper around multiple BLE backends (bluepy, bluez/gatttool, pygatt) providing a unified scanning and GATT API.
Python module for accessing Bluetooth LE Generic Attribute Profile (GATT) devices using BGAPI or gatttool backends.
Bluetooth LE GATT SDK for writing Python client applications with service/characteristic discovery.
Python extension module allowing Python code to access host Bluetooth resources for device discovery and scanning.
Maintained Python 3 fork of PyBluez for modern Python (3.10+) Bluetooth and BLE device discovery.
Node.js and Python-friendly BLE scanner library for Linux that exposes HCI scan results to applications.
Original Node.js BLE central module for scanning, connecting, and GATT communication on macOS, Linux, and Windows.
Actively maintained community fork of the noble Node.js BLE central module with async/Promise support.
Node.js module for implementing BLE peripherals, commonly used with noble for central/peripheral BLE setups.
Go package for building Bluetooth Low Energy peripherals and centrals with full GATT implementation.
Cross-platform Bluetooth Low Energy library for Go supporting peripheral and central roles on Linux, macOS, and Windows.
Golang Bluetooth Low Energy package for Linux and macOS derived from currantlabs/ble.
Cross-platform Bluetooth API for Go and TinyGo with scanner/advertiser examples, supporting Linux, macOS, and bare metal.
Go-based Bluetooth LE scanner and advertiser using raw HCI user channel sockets for low-level BLE reconnaissance on Linux.
BLE Swiss-army knife for sniffing, jamming, and hijacking Bluetooth Low Energy connections with PCAP export.
Cracks Bluetooth Low Energy encryption by brute-forcing the Temporary Key to recover STK/LTK and decrypt traffic.
Modern Rust reimplementation of the deprecated BlueZ gatttool with scan, enumerate, and MAC spoofing features.
Swiss Army knife for 802.11, BLE, HID and IPv4/IPv6 reconnaissance and MITM with a Go-based ble.recon module.
Open-source Ubertooth host code, firmware, and tools for Bluetooth (BR/EDR) and BLE scanning and capture.
Python API for the Adafruit Bluefruit LE Sniffer to capture BLE traffic to PCAP for Wireshark analysis.
CircuitPython Bluetooth Low Energy library for microcontrollers providing scanning and GATT central/peripheral roles.
